generated_oml:
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization."
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACController, LightingController
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor collecting real-time operational data from the physical building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor collecting real-time operational data from the physical building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor collecting real-time operational data from the physical building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized temperature data from physical sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized occupancy data from physical sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized light data from physical sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric and semantic models enriched with device-specific metadata for the building."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Revit, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data ingestion platform for real-time sensor data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAnalysisService, NonVisualHealthOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management capabilities for data normalization and integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAnalysisService, NonVisualHealthOptimizationService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization engine for 3D rendering of the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for model enrichment and device modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance for analysis and prediction."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service using reinforcement learning for building energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort conditions and adjustment of lighting systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of non-visual health effects in the building environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectInsight, NonVisualHealthAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the building digital twin using Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight on building operational status."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from building performance simulation."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight for energy consumption optimization."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on visual comfort conditions in the building."
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on non-visual health effects in the building environment."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of the building digital twin."
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust HVAC systems for energy optimization and comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust lighting systems for visual comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust building systems for non-visual health optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator and controller within Building Control Systems for HVAC adjustment."
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator and controller within Building Control Systems for lighting adjustment."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by DT services (e.g., optimized HVAC settings) sent via Eclipse Ditto to actuators in the Building Control System, enabling real-time adjustments to physical infrastructure as part of bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twins, ensuring continuous data exchange and operational alignment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A BIM-centric architecture integrating Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular services orchestrated through standardized extension points for scalable, service-oriented DT deployment across AECO workflows."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the 'as operated' phase during building operation, with potential for integration into design and construction phases via BIM, but primarily focused on operational monitoring and optimization throughout the complete building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity measured via the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which quantifies synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual components, validated through case study evaluation in a Living Lab environment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange facilitated by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC) for semantic modeling, with standardized interfaces for Hono/Ditto integration to ensure interoperability across AECO systems and address fragmented data sources."
]
